## ZVS Compliance
- [ ] All Zolai text uses `pasian`, `gam`, `tapa`, `topa` (not `pathian`, `ram`, etc.)
- [ ] Word order is SOV
- [ ] No `i uh` plural combination
- [ ] Negation uses `kei` not `lo` for conditionals

## Testing
- [ ] Ran `python scripts/maintenance/test_grammar_rules.py`
- [ ] Ran `zolai audit-jsonl` on any modified JSONL files
- [ ] Tested locally
